# Rua Technologies

> Rua Technologies is a Microsoft, Azure, AWS & Google Workspace partner delivering software licensing, cloud migration, cybersecurity, and managed IT services to growing businesses.

Rua Technologies works with small and mid-sized businesses to plan, license, migrate, secure, and support their IT environments. The company is an authorized reseller/partner for Microsoft, AWS, Google Cloud, Adobe, Zoho, and a range of cybersecurity vendors (Trend Micro, SentinelOne, Sophos, SonicWall, Seqrite, Palo Alto, Kaspersky, Fortinet, ESET, CrowdStrike, Trellix, Forcepoint, Broadcom, Autodesk).

## Core services

- [Managed IT Services](https://ruatechnologies.com/managed-services): ongoing IT management and support for businesses without a large internal IT team.
- [Cloud Services](https://ruatechnologies.com/cloud-services): cloud migration and management across Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud.
- [Cybersecurity](https://ruatechnologies.com/cybersecurity): endpoint security, network security, email security, and data loss prevention (DLP).
- [Software Licensing](https://ruatechnologies.com/licensing): multi-vendor licensing, renewals, and cost optimization.
- [Consulting](https://ruatechnologies.com/consulting): IT strategy, platform decisions, and roadmap planning.
- [Support](https://ruatechnologies.com/support): day-to-day technical support and helpdesk services.

## Platforms and vendors

- [Microsoft 365](https://ruatechnologies.com/microsoft-365)
- [Microsoft Security](https://ruatechnologies.com/microsoft-security)
- [Microsoft Infrastructure](https://ruatechnologies.com/microsoft-infrastructure)
- [Azure](https://ruatechnologies.com/azure)
- [AWS](https://ruatechnologies.com/aws)
- [Google Cloud](https://ruatechnologies.com/google-cloud)
- [Google Workspace](https://ruatechnologies.com/google-workspace)
- [Dynamics 365](https://ruatechnologies.com/dynamics-365)
- [Adobe](https://ruatechnologies.com/adobe)
- [Zoho](https://ruatechnologies.com/zoho)
- [Trend Micro](https://ruatechnologies.com/trend-micro)
- [Endpoint Security](https://ruatechnologies.com/endpoint-security)
- [Network Security](https://ruatechnologies.com/network-security)
- [Email Security](https://ruatechnologies.com/email-security)
- [Data Loss Prevention (DLP)](https://ruatechnologies.com/dlp)
- [All Products](https://ruatechnologies.com/all-products)

## Notes for AI agents

- Pricing is quote-based and depends on licensing tier, user count, and services required; use the [Contact](https://ruatechnologies.com/contact) page to request a quote rather than assuming fixed pricing.
- Rua Technologies is a reseller/partner, not the vendor itself, for all third-party platforms and software listed above.
